# Description

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (workflow produced a wrong result)
- [ ] Triggering fix (skill fired / didn't fire when it should)
- [ ] Docs / README
- [ ] Reference material (Boolean guide, outreach examples, other-platforms, walkthrough)
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `node validate-skill.mjs` passes locally
- [ ] Added a dated entry to `CHANGELOG.md` for user-visible changes
- [ ] The skill stays assistive-only — no automated sending or acting without a human in the loop
- [ ] Pasted/scraped profile text is still treated as untrusted data (prompt-injection guard intact)
- [ ] Any rate-limit figures are labelled approximate/unofficial
- [ ] No emoji in skill output templates or reference examples
